Chat Edit: 'Please fully reverse engineer any and all of the production deployment code that hasnt been added to it and the inbetween into full production working ready and begin fully scaffolding and planning on everything that is completely missing as well like my custom made model loaders and agentic and autonomous and win32 deployments:

continue the production deployment by reverse-engineering any remaining code and scaffolding the missing features you mentioned: custom model loaders, agentic/autonomous systems, and Win32 deployments

Not just those things mentioned however there are a ton of things that need to be designed and fully tested to ensure its even doable in pure powershell '
